violations.text: The ceiling in the preparation area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Area where beverages and food are prepared to be replaced with the proper ceiling tiles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The handwashing sinks in the prep area and restroom do not have handwashing signs. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
